import React from 'react'; import { formatCurrency } from '../../utils/formatters'; const DeductionsForm = ({ deductions, onChange, t, ValidatedInput }) => { const calculateItemizedTotal = () => { return (Number(deductions.mortgageInterest) || 0) + (Number(deductions.stateLocalTaxes) || 0) + (Number(deductions.charitableContributions) || 0) + (Number(deductions.medicalExpenses) || 0) + (Number(deductions.otherItemized) || 0); }; return (

{t('deductions.title')}

{!deductions.useStandardDeduction && (
{formatCurrency(calculateItemizedTotal())}
{calculateItemizedTotal() < deductions.standardDeduction && (
💡 Standard deduction is higher ({formatCurrency(deductions.standardDeduction)})
)}
)}
); }; export default DeductionsForm;
